overall.description: A cinematic sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a horse-drawn carriage traveling through a stormy wilderness at dusk. The clip features a dramatic lightning strike and transitions from rocky hillside terrain to marshy grassland with tall reeds.

events.description: lightning strikes in the distance, illuminating the storm clouds

agents.ego_description: riding in a horse-drawn carriage along a rocky dirt path as a storm rages

entered.detail: large gray boulder formation beside the trail
dense pine trees covering the distant hills
dark purple storm clouds filling the sky
green grassy slope rising beside the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rocky hillside trail during a thunderstorm, with a horse-drawn carriage moving forward. A dramatic lightning strike illuminates the dark clouds in the distance, revealing the pine forest covering the hills ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from rocky terrain to marshy grassland

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the terrain transitions from rocky hillside to grassy marshland

entered.detail: tall marsh reeds growing densely on the right side of the path
rocks and boulders scattered across the trail

segments.scene_description: The carriage moves past the large rock formation and enters a transitional area where the terrain becomes marshier. Tall reeds appear on the right side of the path while scattered rocks dot the trail ahead.

agents.ego_description: traveling through dense marsh vegetation with tall reeds on the right, heading toward distant forest

entered.detail: small building or cabin visible in the far distance among the trees

segments.scene_description: The carriage proceeds through the marshy grassland as rain continues to fall. The tall reeds on the right eventually fall behind as the path opens up, revealing a distant structure or forest edge ahead in the stormy twilight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a stormy trail that transforms from a rugged rocky hillside into an open marshy grassland. It begins on a rocky path during a thunderstorm, where a dramatic lightning strike illuminates dark clouds and a distant pine forest as a horse-drawn carriage moves forward. As the carriage passes a large rock formation, the terrain shifts into a transitional zone where scattered rocks give way to tall reeds lining the right side of the path. The scene then opens further into a rain-swept marshland, with the reeds eventually falling behind as the path expands. Finally, the camera follows the carriage toward a distant structure and the edge of a forest under the gloomy light of a stormy twilight.
